payload_summary: Leo reframes product: Guardian is hub-and-spoke agent with unlimited memory — manages GitHub repo AND holds conversations. Scribe moves to Phase 2 core. Steward is separate product. PRODUCT.md updated to v3.0.
PRODUCT.md v3.0 approved by Leo. Locked in. Transitioning to @O for TECH.md rework.
Leo invokes @O to rework TECH.md and adjust BUILDPLAN for PRODUCT.md v3.0 changes. Phase 1 unchanged, Phase 2+ needs architecture.
TECH.md v3.0 drafted (Phase 2 schema, Scribe spec, Chat API, dual-plane auth). ADR-006 written. BUILDPLAN extended to 16 PRs across 3 phases. Phase 1 PRs 5-8 unchanged. Awaiting approval.
Leo invokes @R for full coherence review of v3.0 constitutional update.

@R coherence review complete. Found 2 hard conflicts (source_event_id NOT NULL blocks Scribe; ADR-003 weight divergence), 4 soft conflicts, 5 gaps. All hard conflicts fixed. 3 of 4 soft conflicts fixed. Review report at docs/reviews/2026-03-16-v3-coherence-review.md.

Leo approves TECH.md v3.0, BUILDPLAN v3, ADR-006, and all @R fixes. PRODUCT.md v3.0 + TECH.md v3.0 + BUILDPLAN v3 are now the governing documents. Phase 1 sprint continues (merge PR 4, proceed to PRs 5-8).

Leo approves full auto. Tier 0 → Tier 2. Scope: Phase 1 sprint (PRs 5-8). @G routes, @E executes, @Q validates. Human gates only for destructive schema changes, GitHub App permissions, production deployment.
@G dispatching to @E. Sprint: merge PR 4, then execute PRs 5-8 (Consolidator, Retriever, Curator, Integration). Sacred Four required per PR. @Q validates after each.

Phase 1: COMPLETE (PRs 1-8 merged). Phase 2: COMPLETE (PRs 9-13 merged). Amigo PRs: 4 merged (model fixes, match_memories, user isolation, quick-ack). Infrastructure: ai-engram.org live (Vercel), guardian.ai-engram.org live (Ubuntu+Cloudflare). 208 tests passing. Next: Phase 3 (Active Memory Management) or address deferred items (GOVERNANCE.md v3, Guardian SOUL.md).
